api-application.name: API Application
api-application.description: ElysiaJS REST API application for MoneyWorks with Swagger, CORS, and middleware chain

auth-middleware.name: Authentication Middleware
auth-middleware.description: Bearer token validation middleware that attaches MoneyWorks client to request context with caching

smart-moneyworks-client.name: SmartMoneyWorksClient
smart-moneyworks-client.description: MoneyWorks REST client with automatic field discovery and multiple export format support

field-discovery.name: Field Discovery System
field-discovery.description: Discovers MoneyWorks table field structure from XML exports since TSV has no headers

tax-rate-entity.name: MoneyWorksTaxRate
tax-rate-entity.description: Canonical MoneyWorks TaxRate entity with GST terminology preserved

client-cache.name: Client Cache
client-cache.description: LRU-like cache for MoneyWorks clients with TTL-based cleanup

api-uses-middleware.description: API application uses auth middleware for request authentication

middleware-uses-client.description: Auth middleware creates and caches SmartMoneyWorksClient instances

client-uses-discovery.description: Smart client uses field discovery to determine table structures

middleware-uses-cache.description: Auth middleware uses client cache to avoid recreating clients

client-processes-entity.description: Smart client exports and parses MoneyWorks TaxRate entities

canonical-dsl-purity.description: NEVER translate MoneyWorks terminology - preserve exact field names (GST, TaxCode, RecAccount)

auth-bearer-token.description: All protected endpoints require Bearer token in Authorization header

field-discovery-required.description: TSV exports have no headers, must use XML to discover field structure
